# A9 Skills Index

Master directory of all available skills for A9 sub-agents. Each skill file contains practical patterns, best practices, and reference examples optimized for reusability across agent tasks.

## XML Skills

Comprehensive patterns and utilities for XML processing, validation, and transformation tasks.

| Skill | Purpose | Use When |
| ------- | --------- | ---------- |
| [xml-parser-utilities.md](xml/xml-parser-utilities.md) | XML parsing patterns, libraries, and common approaches | Extracting data from XML, parsing complex documents, selecting specific elements |
| [xml-validator-rules.md](xml/xml-validator-rules.md) | Schema validation, validation tools, and best practices | Validating XML against schemas, ensuring data quality, implementing validation rules |
| [xml-transformer-patterns.md](xml/xml-transformer-patterns.md) | XPath, XSLT, and transformation patterns (XML-to-JSON/CSV) | Converting between XML and other formats, applying complex transformations |

## DataBricks Skills

Optimization and performance patterns for DataBricks analytics workloads.

| Skill | Purpose | Use When |
| ------- | --------- | ---------- |
| [databricks-efficiency-analysis.md](databricks/databricks-efficiency-analysis.md) | Identifying inefficiency patterns, cost drivers, and query optimization | Reducing computation costs, identifying bottlenecks, analyzing query performance |
| [databricks-performance-patterns.md](databricks/databricks-performance-patterns.md) | Best practices for performance and infrastructure optimization | Scaling workloads, improving cluster efficiency, optimizing data pipelines |
| [databricks-optimization-checklist.md](databricks/databricks-optimization-checklist.md) | Step-by-step checklist for optimizing DataBricks workloads | Planning optimization initiatives, auditing existing workloads, implementing improvements |

## Web/UI Flask Skills

Flask web development patterns and UI component architecture.

| Skill | Purpose | Use When |
| ------- | --------- | ---------- |
| [flask-setup-patterns.md](web-ui/flask-setup-patterns.md) | Flask project structure, routing, blueprints, and configuration patterns | Setting up new Flask projects, organizing code architecture, implementing routing |
| [centralized-css-architecture.md](web-ui/centralized-css-architecture.md) | CSS strategy, SCSS preprocessing, and reusable class libraries | Designing scalable CSS systems, avoiding inline styles, building component libraries |
| [web-ui-component-library.md](web-ui/web-ui-component-library.md) | Reusable component patterns and Flask Jinja2 template implementations | Creating consistent UI components, building forms, modals, tables, headers |
